charityBlurb: Over the Moon runs The Scrap Space — a creative reuse hub where donated materials get a second life. They just opened their Brighton branch in September 2025. Help spread the word.
charityTagline: Creativity, sustainability and community along the Sussex coast.
actions: Visit The Scrap Space at Community Base, Brighton
